memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/AUSTRIA.htm#Judithdiedafter1178 as of 6/4/2016

JUDITH (-after 1178).  The wife of Marchese Guglielmo is recorded by William of Tyre as sister of Konrad III …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith von Babenberg於1115年出生在奧地利尼德洛斯特利希圖利可洛斯特尼包格時，她的父親Leopold III. Markgraf von Österreich42歲，母親Agnes von Waiblingen Herzogin von Schwaben und Markgräfin Marcha orientalis43歲。她於1133年3月28日與Guillaume V de Montferrat在義大利皮蒙特阿利善德利亞蒙福拉托結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1164年11月22日在她的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在澳洲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Judith von Babenberg于1115年出生在奥地利尼德洛斯特利希圖利可洛斯特尼包格时，她的父亲Leopold III. Markgraf von Österreich42岁，母亲Agnes von Waiblingen Herzogin von Schwaben und Markgräfin Marcha orientalis43岁。她于1133年3月28日与Guillaume V de Montferrat在意大利皮蒙特阿利善德利亞蒙福拉托结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1164年11月22日在她的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在澳大利亚。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Babenberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Rabenberg, as for example in Saxony or Lower Saxony.

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Judith von Babenberg was born in 1115, in Klosterneuburg, Tulln, Lower Austria, Austria, her father, Leopold III. Markgraf von Österreich, was 42 and her mother, Agnes von Waiblingen Herzogin von Schwaben und Markgräfin Marcha orientalis, was 43. She married Guillaume V de Montferrat on 28 March 1133, in Monferrato, Alessandria, Piedmont, Italy. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 22 November 1164, in her hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Australia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith von Babenberg est née en 1115, à Klosterneuburg, Tulln, Niederösterreich, Autriche, son père, Leopold III. Markgraf von Österreich, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Waiblingen Herzogin von Schwaben und Markgräfin Marcha orientalis, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume V de Montferrat le 28 mars 1133, à Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 novembre 1164, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Australie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Judith von Babenberg 1115 in Klosterneuburg, Tulln, Niederösterreich, Österreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Leopold III. Markgraf von Österreich 42 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Waiblingen Herzogin von Schwaben und Markgräfin Marcha orientalis 43. Sie hat am 28. März 1133 in Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Italien Guillaume V de Montferrat geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. November 1164 im Alter von 49 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Australien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Judith von Babenberg è nata il nel 1115 nel Klosterneuburg, Tulln, Niederösterreich, Austria, sua padre, Leopold III. Markgraf von Österreich, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Waiblingen Herzogin von Schwaben und Markgräfin Marcha orientalis, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume V de Montferrat il 28 marzo 1133, nel Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 novembre 1164, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Australia.

ja.lifeSummary: Judith von Babenbergが1115年にオーストリアニーデルoステレイチトゥルンクロステルネウブルグで生まれた時，父Leopold III. Markgraf von Österreichは42歳，母Agnes von Waiblingen Herzogin von Schwaben und Markgräfin Marcha orientalisは43歳であった。1133年3月28日にイタリアピエモントアレッサンドリアモンフエラトーでGuillaume V de Montferratと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1164年11月22日に故郷で49歳で死去し，オーストラリアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Judith von Babenberg(이)가 1115년 오스트리아 니더o스터레이치 툴 클로스터니우버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Leopold III. Markgraf von Österreich(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Waiblingen Herzogin von Schwaben und Markgräfin Marcha orientalis(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1133년 3월 28일 이탈리아 피몽 알레산드리아 몬페라토에서 Guillaume V de Montferrat(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1164년 11월 22일 그녀의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트레일리아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judith von Babenberg nasceu em 1115, em Klosterneuburg, Tulln, Niederösterreich, Áustria, seu pai, Leopold III. Markgraf von Österreich, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Waiblingen Herzogin von Schwaben und Markgräfin Marcha orientalis, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume V de Montferrat em 28 de março de 1133, em Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1164, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Austrália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith von Babenberg родилась в 1115 г. в местности клостирнеубург, туллн, ниедирoстирраич, Австрия, её отцу по имени Leopold III. Markgraf von Österreich было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Waiblingen Herzogin von Schwaben und Markgräfin Marcha orientalis, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume V de Montferrat 28 марта 1133 г. в местности монфиррато, алессэндря, пиемонт, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 22 ноября 1164 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности Австралия.

sm.from 1140 to 1144 AD: mai le 1140 e o'o I le 1144
sm.from 1135 to 1168: mai le 1135 e o'o I le 1168

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Judith von Babenberg nació en 1115, en Klosterneuburg, Tulln, Niederösterreich, Austria, su papá, Leopold III. Markgraf von Österreich, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Agnes von Waiblingen Herzogin von Schwaben und Markgräfin Marcha orientalis, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Guillaume V de Montferrat el 28 de marzo de 1133, en Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de noviembre de 1164, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Australia.
